SAMPLE INVOICE – Waste & Recycling – January 2026
================================================

Contractor: Recorra
Invoice No: REC-0126-140ALD
Invoice Date: 31 January 2026
Billed To: Apex Group Services UK
Property: 140 Aldersgate
Address: 140 Aldersgate Street, London EC1A 4HY

Period: January 2026 (01 Jan 2026 – 31 Jan 2026)

WASTE STREAMS – WEIGHT (kg) & COST
----------------------------------
Stream                  | Weight (kg) | Net (£)
------------------------|-------------|--------
Household waste         |        420  |  168.00
Mixed paper & card      |        285  |   57.00
Plastics                |        120  |   24.00
Mixed glass             |         95  |   19.00
Food tins & drink cans  |         48  |    9.60
------------------------|-------------|--------
Total weight            |        968  |
Net total               |             |  277.60
VAT (20%)               |             |   55.52
TOTAL DUE               |             |  333.12

Confidence: Measured by weight
Contract type: Direct tenant / Third-party
Scope: 3 (Waste – Category 5)

---
This is a sample waste invoice for testing the Data Library Waste upload.
Use it on the Waste page: Upload → select this file. The app should create
a data_library_record with subject_category "waste", name e.g. "Waste Jan 2026 – Recorra",
and attach this file as evidence. Property: 140 Aldersgate.
